name: moon-cumulo-demo
description: MoonBit Cumulo-style diff transport demo with the standalone recollect patch engine.

scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:server
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n ws,web "npm run build:server && npm run serve:server" "npm run serve:web"
scripts.start: npm run prepare:web && npm run build:server && concurrently -k -n ws,web "npm:serve:server" "npm:serve:web"
